recommendations.title: Triangle
recommendations.overview: When Jess sets sail on a yacht with a group of friends, she cannot shake the feeling that there is something wrong.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: A young law student, grieving for his dying mother, struggles to decide whether he should kill his unfaithful step-father.

recommendations.title: The Banishing
recommendations.overview: In the 1930s, a young reverend and his family are forced to confront their worst fears when they discover their new home holds a horrifying secret.

recommendations.title: Consecration
recommendations.overview: After the alleged suicide of her priest brother, Grace travels to the remote Scottish convent where he fell to his death. Distrusting the Church's account, she uncovers murder, sacrilege and a disturbing truth about herself.

recommendations.title: Get Santa
recommendations.overview: A father and son must team up to save Christmas when they discover Santa Claus sleeping in their garage, having crashed his sleigh and found himself on the run from the police.

recommendations.title: Severance
recommendations.overview: Seven employees of an international weapons manufacturer are treated to a team-building weekend at the company’s newly built luxury spa lodge. Things quickly go awry as the colleagues find their corporate weekend sabotaged by a deadly enemy.

recommendations.title: Catacombs
recommendations.overview: A young woman in Paris goes to a party in the enormous labyrinth of limestone tunnels beneath Paris. When she becomes separated from her friends, she is convinced something is chasing her through the dark tunnels.

recommendations.title: Black Death
recommendations.overview: As the plague decimates medieval Europe, rumours circulate of a village immune from the plague. There is talk of a necromancer who leads the village and is able to raise the dead. A fearsome knight joined by a cohort of soldiers and a young monk are

recommendations.title: Stag Night
recommendations.overview: Four guys on a bachelor party get off the subway at a station that shut down in the 70's and, after watching a transit cop get brutally murdered, find themselves running for their lives beneath the streets of NY.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.
